positive: Minimalist abstract composition featuring a whimsical forest landscape intersecting with geometric cosmic elements. A central, highly stylized silhouette of a stag (deer) stands among bioluminescent trees and glowing stylized flora. The background should blend soft gradient cosmic nebula colors (deep indigo, sapphire blue, violet) with stark, contrasting line-art geometric patterns (gold, electric cyan). Focus on clean separation between natural and abstract elements. Strong, even lighting, high contrast, central focus, suitable for repeat pattern application or apparel print. Vector illustration aesthetic, ethereal, clean lines, symmetrical composition.
